pi_items.verified_value: All listed brands are real, legitimate gas station brands/fuel retailers operating in the United States: Shell (major global oil company), Chevron (major oil company), ARCO (Marathon Petroleum brand, ~1,500 locations), 76/Union 76 (Phillips 66 brand), Mobil (ExxonMobil brand), Costco (wholesale gas stations), Valero (supplies ~7,000 outlets), Rotten Robbie (39 Bay Area locations), Exxon (major oil company), Texaco (international brand), Speedway (7-Eleven owned, ~2,730 US locations)
pi_items.source: Web searches verifying each brand: ARCO Wikipedia/Marathon Petroleum, 76 Wikipedia/Phillips 66, Valero company information, Rotten Robbie company profile, Speedway Wikipedia/7-Eleven acquisition. Shell, Chevron, Mobil, Exxon are major publicly known brands.

pi_items.verified_value: Confirmed UI elements visible in Sygic GPS detail view for POIs. Screenshot evidence shows: (1) 'Get Directions' button - prominent blue button at detail view bottom; (2) Distance in kilometers (km) - displayed as '5.7 km'; (3) Address information - displayed as '8551 East Road, Redwood Valley'. Sygic documentation confirms 'Get directions' button is standard for navigating to places. Distance and address are standard detail view components.
pi_items.source: Live screenshot from episode_20260307_175129_ccab72b6-54da-4a1b-9198-216a10a9d2da/final.png showing Redwood Valley Station detail. Sygic manual confirming 'Get directions' button. Web search results for Sygic POI detail functionality.

pi_items.metadata_value: Uses Sygic GPS Navigation Android app (com.sygic.aura)
pi_items.verified_value: Confirmed. Sygic GPS Navigation is a real, publicly available Android application. Official app on Google Play Store. Supports POI categories including petrol/gas stations. Has documented fuel price and station location search features.
pi_items.source: Google Play Store listing for com.sygic.aura. Sygic official documentation. Web search results confirm Sygic has gas station/petrol station POI category support.

pi_items.metadata_value: Task requires finding nearby gas stations via Points of Interest (POI) categories in Sygic
pi_items.verified_value: Confirmed. Sygic GPS Navigation has dedicated POI categories. Documentation and search results confirm petrol/gas stations are one of the main POI categories alongside restaurants, parking, tourist attractions. App description states users can browse POI categories and select specific stations.
pi_items.source: Sygic official website and documentation for POI/Places functionality. Search results: manula.com documentation on POI searching, Sygic developers API documentation.

pi_items.metadata_value: Sygic supports finding fuel stations with price information
pi_items.verified_value: Confirmed. Sygic GPS Navigation provides fuel price information at petrol stations in multiple countries. App includes comparison of fuel prices and finding cheapest stations. Fuel data provided by OPIS (comprehensive fuel pricing database).
pi_items.source: Sygic blog posts about fuel prices feature, Sygic official documentation on fuel prices functionality, news articles about new fuel price features.

pi_items.metadata_value: Difficulty: medium, Timeout: 180 seconds, Max steps: 40, Reward type: sparse
pi_items.verified_value: Parameters are reasonable based on task complexity. Finding a POI category and selecting a station is a moderate interaction task. 180 seconds provides adequate time for app startup, navigation, and selection. 40 steps is sufficient for POI browsing. Sparse reward (binary success/failure) is appropriate for completion-based verification.
pi_items.source: Task analysis from task.json and verifier logic. Comparison with typical mobile interaction task parameters.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real Sygic GPS Navigation Android application (com.sygic.aura) with genuine POI functionality for gas stations. All target keywords (Shell, Chevron, Arco, 76, Mobil, Costco, Valero, Rotten Robbie, Exxon, Texaco, Speedway) are legitimate, operating gas station brands in the United States. Detail indicators are verified from actual UI: 'Get Directions' button, distance displays (mi/km), and address text appear in Sygic gas station detail views. Evidence shows successful task completion displays station names, addresses, distances, and navigation buttons matching the metadata indicators. No synthetic data - task uses real app and real gas station data from Sygic's POI database.
